'''Jesse Harlin''' (b. [[August 11]], [[1976]], Pine Grove Mills, PA) was the Staff Composer for [[LucasArts]], a [[Lucasfilm]] company. Most known for composing the soundtrack to ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'', Harlin has been scoring games in the video-game industry since 1999. From 2003 until its closure in 2013, he worked for [[LucasArts]] and worked on games such as [[Wikipedia:Gladius (video game)|''Gladius'']], [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'' video game]], ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'', as well as the cancelled ''[[Star Wars: 1313]]''.

For [[Star Wars: Republic Commando (soundtrack)|''Republic Commando'']], Harlin created the ''[[Star Wars]]'' language Ancient Mandalorian, which later became the basis for [[Karen Traviss]]'s [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']].
